$comment: SMGP team-season history capsules, season 16 (SMGP-024). Base-universe history: the world's own arc, NOT the player career. DISPLAY-ONLY, never a fold input.

team.madonna.summary: Paraded as the greatest of the twenty-five years, the king spent his Jubilee being the thing the parade was measured against. Under the original first-season flag at San Marino, the MADONNA 456 posted the season's first reference before the heritage machines had finished their lap, and the tightest field in memory spent sixteen rounds failing to reach it. Asselin closed the door on schedule, the PALM 190 V10 never raised its voice, and the almanac's round-number marks crept closer, counted aloud by the grandstands. The crown does not do nostalgia. It does arithmetic.
team.madonna.objective: Arrive at its own parade as the present tense, and leave the arithmetic untouched.
team.madonna.definingEvent: San Marino, under the original first-season flag: the reference posted before the parade has formed.
team.madonna.carryForward: The summit is proclaimed at mid-season, and the king's winter acquires a single sentence.

team.firenze.summary: Bloodline honoured at every round, the wine-dark house spent its anniversary insisting the bunting notice the present. Elssler waved from the champions' open car at Great Britain with one hand and kept the other on the season, his alpine arithmetic the coldest thing in the compressed field, the FIRENZE 99 V12's aria intact beneath the FIRENZE 500's heritage silverwork. Germi supplied the opera the Jubilee demanded, though Italy's loudest hour belonged, again, to someone else's story. Second to the crown, closer than the portraits suggest, the ice heard the mid-season proclamation with professional interest.
team.firenze.objective: Make the anniversary honour the present, not merely the bloodline.
team.firenze.definingEvent: Great Britain: the ice climbs out of the champions' car and back into the argument.
team.firenze.carryForward: The Crown of Crowns gives the interruption one last alpine stage, and the ice is armed.

team.millions.summary: Heritage, the chrome garage discovered, is the one market where it pays to be seen paying respects. The MILLIONS 189 ran its expensive, excellent campaign beneath vintage bunting, Jones at a respectful volume, while Alberti became the anniversary's loudest conscience, telling every microphone that the celebration exists because the Charter kept them all here to enjoy it. The DICK MD V10 sang in period costume. The accountants abandoned a second memo, this one on the market value of being applauded. When the summit was proclaimed at mid-season, the gold heard a price being set.
team.millions.objective: Be photographed paying respects, and price the summit before anyone else does.
team.millions.definingEvent: Alberti's microphone season: the patrician explains, at every round, what the Charter bought.
team.millions.carryForward: The respects are paid; next season the gold intends to pay for the argument itself.

team.bestowal.summary: Asked by the anniversary what it stands for, the cathedral answered with invoice and altar both. Blume's metronome and Picos's warm Sundays kept the BESTOWAL 167 at the fast circuits' reference, the sealed VAPOR DN still the long straight's standing argument, while the marble garage wore its heritage colours like a house that had always expected to be painted. The autumn belonged to the second drawing board: the Crown of Crowns framework read, priced, and begun before most garages had finished applauding it. Patience, the benefactor noted in his review, compounds.
team.bestowal.objective: Answer the Jubilee's question with invoice and altar, and begin the summit early.
team.bestowal.definingEvent: The marble garage runs two drawing boards at once and calls it worship.
team.bestowal.carryForward: Two drawing boards become one, aimed at the summit's power cathedrals.

team.blanche.summary: White in the bunting at last, and the champagne moved to the front of the fridge. Herbin's spotless reference craft carried the BLANCHE 582 into the autumn still armed, the DELTA 103 V10's thrift and thunder now the grid's standing lecture, the aristocrats no longer studying but copying. White grafted and grinned, the garage's one permitted emotion. The whitecoats' concession to the anniversary was a heritage stripe, applied with surgical gloves and photographed exactly once. The establishment's mirrors have held the white car for four straight seasons. The unease is permanent, and both sides know it.
team.blanche.objective: Enter the autumn armed, and make the white car a permanent fact of the mirrors.
team.blanche.definingEvent: Herbin's name read aloud with the autumn's armed, the whitecoats pretending not to listen.
team.blanche.carryForward: The summit's field will include the white car as an equal, and the champagne travels.

team.tyrant.summary: The boot camp spent the soft-hearted season refusing to soften. While the paddock wept at its own almanac, Hamano's crossover patience kept the TYRANT 548 at the compressed front, the LIZZIE 24 V8 finishing everything with drill-yard regularity, and Gould preached the island sermon at Canada on schedule, wall and all. At Japan the boiling point arrived on cue, more drivers mathematically armed than any season in the almanac, and the gunmetal car was the calmest thing in it. The crew's verdict on the anniversary fits the creed: sentiment is a braking zone. Brake later.
team.tyrant.objective: Refuse the soft-hearted season, and be the calmest thing at the boiling point.
team.tyrant.definingEvent: Japan: the boiling point on schedule, and the gunmetal car the calm at the middle of it.
team.tyrant.carryForward: The summit ends in a last brawl, and the boot camp has kept its knuckles.

team.losel.summary: Anniversaries are soft numbers, and the data door does not trade in them. Pacheco closed his cold sums through the Jubilee's compressed midfield, the LOSEL 125's VAPOR DNPQ V8 holding every filed curve, Dehehe ticking in support, while the slide rules priced the front-row census a fortnight before the big board opened its book on a ninth house. The season's real work was invisible: the Crown of Crowns sporting framework, modelled within a month of publication, the drawing office already living in two campaigns at once. The gap between their numbers and everyone else's, the garage notes, is the plan.
team.losel.objective: Price the soft season in hard numbers, and model the summit before it exists.
team.losel.definingEvent: The front-row census priced a fortnight early: the slide rules beat the big board's book.
team.losel.carryForward: The model has the summit solved already; the season will be asked to catch up.

team.may.summary: The youngest movement on the ladder heard its own short history read aloud on the tannoy and decided it liked being old enough to archive. Turner mugged the distracted through the compressed field, the MAY 555's LORRY 32 V8 finishing with family-dog loyalty, and the front-row census kept one green afternoon pencilled in the margin. The crew wore the heritage stripe like a first suit. When the mid-season proclamation named next year the Crown of Crowns, the leaf-green garage whistled: springs, it noted, are measured by what they reach, and this one has grown teeth.
team.may.objective: Enjoy being archived, and keep a green afternoon in the census margin.
team.may.definingEvent: The tannoy's almanac reaches the leaf-green years, and the garage applauds itself.
team.may.carryForward: Spring wants a chapter of the summit, and the crew has started whistling it.

team.bullets.summary: Borrowed everything, repaid in noise. The #17 still carried its thousand small names, now the Jubilee's favourite paragraph, and at Brazil the grandstand unfurled a mile-long banner of twenty-five years of defiance while the establishment applauded through gritted teeth. Ceara spent the late fire with an elder's economy, the featherweight BULLETS 560 and its customer LIZZIE 24 V8 finishing what the fire started, and arrived at the autumn rounds still armed, which at this address is a form of accounting scandal. The lock-up's ledger has one page left. It is priced for a summit.
team.bullets.objective: Spend the late fire into autumn, and price the last page for a summit.
team.bullets.definingEvent: Brazil: a mile of banner, twenty-five years of defiance, applauded through gritted teeth.
team.bullets.carryForward: The summit is the last climb's true top, and the lock-up mortgages the future one final time.

team.dardan.summary: Peace, it turns out, has a pit crew too, and it is fast. The oxblood house ran the anniversary without an enemy for the first time in memory, Alfven's ice and Bellini's late grace banking the DARDAN 700's best arithmetic of the era, the VAPOR DNPQ V8 faultless. Italy cheered the old spear again, and this year it sounded less like forgiveness than habit. The clan watched the backstreet banner at Brazil with something dangerously close to fondness. A grudge ended, the garage has learned, is not a cost written off. It is capital, drawing interest.
team.dardan.objective: Prove peace is fast, and bank the grudge's capital.
team.dardan.definingEvent: Italy's cheer becomes habit: the oxblood car received as a fixture, not a forgiven man.
team.dardan.carryForward: The summit's temple chapter will want the spear standing beside it, and peace pays one more dividend.

team.linden.summary: All twenty-five seasons, lived in green, and cheered at every round of the twenty-fifth. Moreau brought the LINDEN LN198 home through the Jubilee with the usual agrarian patience, the LORRY 32 V8 seasoned past all argument, while the tannoy read the tenure aloud sixteen times and the old tree pretended not to hear. At the microphones he was the Charter's loudest witness: the celebration exists, he said, because everyone is still here to enjoy it. The watch kept being set. The root kept growing. The golden age has a conscience, and it is green.
team.linden.objective: Be cheered at every round, and finish everything anyway.
team.linden.definingEvent: The tenure read aloud at all sixteen rounds, and the old green car still there to hear it.
team.linden.carryForward: The summit will set its watch by him one last time, and he will be exactly where it says.

team.minarae.summary: The established address behaved like one. Nono's second act ran at full heat, the #21 converting menace into weekly fact in the compressed field, the MINARAE 594 and the SEGA SG1000 V8 equal at last to everything the forge promised, and the autumn rounds arrived with the flame's name read among the armed. Miller stood across the garage with the look of a man whose life's work has learned to drive, grading laps he no longer needs to grade. The canyon waits for its home date. The forge, for the first time in its life, is expected somewhere.
team.minarae.objective: Run the forge as an established address, and arrive at the autumn armed.
team.minarae.definingEvent: The flame's name read with the autumn's armed, and Miller folds his arms and nods.
team.minarae.carryForward: The flame is aimed at the summit, and Miller's drilling finally has a date.

team.rigel.summary: Every garage in the paddock went heritage for the Jubilee; the museum simply already was. The RIGEL 3000 ran the anniversary in its usual midnight blue, which the fashion pages suddenly called archival, and Cotman and Chardin banked the finishes the restored LORRY 32 V8 keeps promising. The lifers' private joke of the season: the trophy shelf needed no costume. The old star was named among the Jubilee's honoured lights, and the card from the backstreet fund, grease-stained and framed, hung in the garage all year like a certificate of membership.
team.rigel.objective: Be honoured as an old light, and finish like one that still burns.
team.rigel.definingEvent: The star named among the honoured lights, and the museum's joke becomes official.
team.rigel.carryForward: The summit's programme will list the star, and the lifers mean to earn the listing.

team.comet.summary: The Jubilee loves a blaze story, and the original belongs to the black car. Tornio said nothing all season, as is the custom, and drove everything, the COMET 323's LIZZIE 24 V8 finishing with romantics' regularity while the tannoy read The Season aloud to crowds who finally understood why the old men kept the reel. One grey afternoon the matte-black car haunted a lead group again, briefly, and the pit lane looked up on schedule. The pan stayed cold. The faith stayed warm. The clubhouse ran the reel twice, for the anniversary.
team.comet.objective: Let the anniversary tell the blaze story, and haunt one more lead group.
team.comet.definingEvent: One grey afternoon in a Jubilee lead group, and the pit lane looking up on schedule.
team.comet.carryForward: The summit's field is compressed enough for one more blaze, and two afternoons get circled.

team.orchis.summary: Celebrated as one of the anniversary's survivors, the flower spent the year doing the thing being celebrated. Tegner read the skies with a professor's calm, the ORCHIS 056 banking its small cool harvests while the circus wept at louder stories, and the MISFIRE 50 V8 completed its sixth clean season, a statistic the gardener-principal had framed. The glasshouse's heritage stripe was a pale one, nearly invisible, which suited everyone. The ledger recorded the era's steadiest little campaign. Survivors, the frost gambler noted, do not get jubilees. They get summers.
team.orchis.objective: Survive beautifully, and let the survivor's statistics do the talking.
team.orchis.definingEvent: The sixth clean season framed, and the wilting years officially reclassified as youth.
team.orchis.carryForward: The summit is the doctrine's final examination, and the flower intends to sit it.

team.zeroforce.summary: The reservation held, and the room was never better. Klinger brought the ZEROFORCE 231 home with a regularity the chalk wall now records without ceremony, the customer LORRY 32 V8 making finishes what the era promised: routine. Twenty-three garages kept the toast poured, or near enough, and the #32 kept arriving one corner short of the day the whole pit lane has circled. The gallows humour has been retired, officially, replaced by something the crew refuses to name. The end of the road has a view, a reservation, and a date it will not say aloud.
team.zeroforce.objective: Finish everything as routine, and keep the reservation for the circled day.
team.zeroforce.definingEvent: The gallows humour retired, and its replacement refusing to be named.
team.zeroforce.carryForward: The summit is the age's last room for the toast, and the glasses stay where they are.

team.joke.summary: The longest, warmest con the carnival ever ran opened at San Marino with a straight face: retirement, effective the final flag. Sixteen grandstands sold out to say goodbye, the tifosi adopted the harlequin #16 as an honorary romantic at Italy, and Dufay milked every encore while the JOKE 777's POND V8 ran thriftily beneath the theatre. Then, at Monaco, beneath all twenty-five season flags, grinning on the grid, he un-announced it, to the loudest laugh the crown jewel has ever heard. The ledger held in LEVEL B. The legend, finally, is bulletproof.
team.joke.objective: Sell out sixteen goodbyes, and keep the seat anyway.
team.joke.definingEvent: Monaco, beneath all twenty-five flags: the un-retirement, and the crown jewel's loudest laugh.
team.joke.carryForward: Un-retired and unrepentant, the carnival reports for the summit it pretended to skip.

team.lares.summary: The paddock's heart was honoured in every motorhome and changed in none. Arai brought the LARES 92 home through the anniversary with the usual courteous reliability, the RAM V12 finishing the season entire, and the mantel filled at the rate the house calls abundance. The Jubilee's heritage colours hung on the hearth-red car like a borrowed coat, handsomely, briefly, and then the lamp went back to its usual light. Old hands filled the doorway all year, and the kettle never went off the boil. Whatever the summit brings, the house noted, supper is at seven.
team.lares.objective: Be the paddock's heart at full ceremony, and change nothing.
team.lares.definingEvent: The heritage coat worn handsomely for one parade, then hung back by the lamp.
team.lares.carryForward: The last flag of the age will fall somewhere, and the lamp will be lit wherever it lands.

team.feet.summary: Honoured as what the sport is for, the grafters clocked in anyway. Rampal dragged the FEET 13 through the anniversary with all three tools earning, the YOUGEN V10 answering every ask, and Old Boots came home in the points the garage calls wages while the tannoy read the working years aloud. The pit lane's caps stayed tipped, one notch lower at each round. The garage's concession to the Jubilee was cleaning the car before the parade, then going straight back to work. The season's ledger: sixteen rounds honoured, sixteen rounds invoiced, nothing given.
team.feet.objective: Clock in for the honour, and invoice all sixteen rounds.
team.feet.definingEvent: The car cleaned for the parade, then driven straight back to work.
team.feet.carryForward: The summit pays the age's last wages, and the grafters have the invoice ready.

team.serga.summary: The parable was told back to its author at full volume, and he pretended not to hear. Sambena welded, drove, and finished, the SERGA 1000's SC3000 F12 as stubborn as the man who signs the cheques, while the tannoy read the grey car's page aloud and the thousand small names were invoked from pulpits he never stood in. Asked to speak at the anniversary, the mountain man sent the car instead, slightly crooked number and all. The pit lane understood. The thanks were already on the flanks. They had been repainted, again, by hand.
team.serga.objective: Endure the parable's retelling, and keep the welding current.
team.serga.definingEvent: Asked to speak at the Jubilee, the mountain man sends the car instead.
team.serga.carryForward: The summit climbs, and the grey car climbs with it, welding as it goes.

team.cool.summary: The greatest show the deckchairs have ever faced, faced from a seated position. Delvaux chased the light through the anniversary's compressed packs, the COOL 05's CORSE V8 humming its sunset tune beneath heritage stripes, and the festivals came at their usual intervals, each celebrated until the light failed. The garage's verdict on the Jubilee, delivered over a cold drink: other people's history is the best entertainment there is. The auctioned deckchair's replacement has a plaque of its own now: for the show. The big board said what it liked. The light went gold on schedule.
team.cool.objective: Watch the greatest show from the best seats, and keep every sunset.
team.cool.definingEvent: The replacement deckchair unveiled with its own plaque: for the show.
team.cool.carryForward: The summit will be the age's finest show, and the deckchairs are already placed.

team.moon.summary: Beginnings were the Jubilee's favourite subject, and the far side is still having one. Yepes waved the leaders through from closer than ever, the MOON 292's RAM V12 completing another full orbit of finishes, and the chalk recorded the gap at its smallest yet: no longer a distance, barely a gap. When the tannoy's almanac reached the far side's first season, the garage listened like weather arriving. The telescope stayed up. The summit, the low voices admitted, is a horizon this orbit can actually reach, and the waxing is no longer a metaphor.
team.moon.objective: Shrink the gap to a margin, and be present at every flag.
team.moon.definingEvent: The chalk records the smallest gap in the garage's history, and no one rubs it out.
team.moon.carryForward: The summit's last flag is a horizon, and the orbit intends to be present at it.

team.iris.summary: Paraded among the crowned and armed among the contenders, the fire spent the anniversary being both, and forgave neither. Salgado waved from the champions' open car at Great Britain and raced the rest of the season like a man reclaiming the photograph, the IRIS 717's PRISM 90 V10 singing at the razor's edge, the white gloves immaculate through sixteen rounds of other people's nostalgia. Portugal gave him his crowd; the autumn kept his name among the armed. Across the wall the frost banked quieter arithmetic. The vow's clock, the cathedral noted, now has a date on it.
team.iris.objective: Parade as a crowned name and race as a contender, without forgiving either.
team.iris.definingEvent: Great Britain: the fire waves from the champions' car, then reclaims the photograph.
team.iris.carryForward: The summit gives the vow its deadline, and the fire would not have it any other way.

team.azalea.summary: The tightest field in memory gathered beneath the bunting, and the coldest thing in it wore magenta. Larssen's arithmetic kept the AZALEA 808 at the front of the compressed packs, the BLOOM 88 V8 flawless, the rooftop lung collecting Mexico's thin air on schedule, and the autumn arrived with the #34 read aloud among the armed. The glasshouse's response to the anniversary was signature: nothing. The bloom holds, the frost waits, and the sister house's photograph sessions across the wall were treated as weather. When the summit was proclaimed, the glasshouse checked the calendar for one date: Mexico.
team.azalea.objective: Hold the bloom at the front through autumn, and circle one date: Mexico.
team.azalea.definingEvent: The #34 read aloud among the autumn's armed, and the glasshouse says nothing, as planted.
team.azalea.carryForward: The summit's cold hinge waits at Mexico, and the decade's cultivation aims at one crown.
